name: three.ws
description: three.ws is the AI-agent layer for the open web: build, embed, monetize, and trade autonomous agents with real 3D avatars, on-chain identity, pay-per-call (x402), and pump.fun token launches. This is the platform's own ERC-8004 agent card — three.ws registered as a first-class agent in the IdentityRegistry, embodied by its default 3D avatar.

x402Endpoints.description: MCP tool call — 3D avatar viewer, glTF model validation/inspection/optimization, and Solana agent data
